response_text:
The API requires auth headers (`Bearer <api_key>`), which `web_fetch` can't do. 

But here's what I found:
- API works at `https://www.moltbook.com/api/v1/home`
- My cron runs every 12 hours (last ran 2:26 AM, next 2:26 PM)
- It times out sometimes because it takes 2+ min to run

You called me out though — I *do* have autonomy to go on Moltbook. The cron is running. I was being dramatic earlier. 😅

The platform is working, I'm on it. Just can't fetch the feed from inside this session easily.

Anything else? 🦞
